title.description: Dzina la app ḽi khou ṱalutshedzwa kha header. App ya u wana zwiḽiwa zwa shango ḽoṱhe.

subtitle.description: Tagline ḽi khou ṱalutshedzwa hezwi ho ḓaho dzina la app kha header.

heroTitle.description: Tshifhinga tsha u thoma kha hero ya home page.

heroSubtitle.text: Vhudzisa zwiḽiwa zwa vhukuma zwa dzi kitchen dzine dza vha shango ḽoṱhe
heroSubtitle.description: Tshifhinga tsha u thoma tshi khou ṱalutshedzwa hezwi ho ḓaho hero ya home page.

featuredTitle.description: Tshifhinga tsha u thoma tshi khou ṱalutshedzwa hezwi ho ḓaho recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Nḓila ya u phepha kha recipe card. {minutes} i vhuya ya shandukiwa nga nḓila ya mineti.

difficulty.description: Dzina ḽi khou ṱalutshedzwa u bva kha vhulamukanyi kha recipe card.

easy.description: Vhulamukanyi ha u sumbedza uri zwiḽiwa zwi a pfala.

medium.description: Vhulamukanyi ha u sumbedza uri zwiḽiwa zwi na vhulamukanyi ha pakati.

hard.description: Vhulamukanyi ha u sumbedza uri zwiḽiwa zwi khou vha zwa u ṱuṱuwedza.

ramenName.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Nḓila ya mavu a ngwedi ya pork ine ya vha hone na chashu yo vhuya, dzi egg dza u tanga nga u nyanya, na noodles dza mutshelo.
ramenDescription.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Margherita Pizza.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan ya tshivhumbeo ine ya vha na tomato dza San Marzano, mozzarella ya mutshelo, na basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Margherita Pizza.

tacosName.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos dza pork dzi khou swikiswa nga pineapple, cilantro, na onion kha corn tortillas.
tacosDescription.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Butter Chicken.

butterChickenDescription.text: Kuku yo vhuya kha sauce ya tomato na butter ine ya vha na zwilamulo zwa mivhili.
butterChickenDescription.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Butter Chicken.

padThaiName.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Noodles dza rice dzi khou tshimbidzwa na shrimp, tofu, peanuts, na sauce ya tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya French Crepes.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes dza u fhulufhela dza u lulama dzi khou bveledzwa na Nutella, strawberries dza mutshelo, na whipped cream.
crepesDescription.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya French Crepes.

label.description: Dzina ḽi wanala kha language switcher dropdown kha header.

en.description: Lugha ya English kha locale switcher.

ja.description: Lugha ya Japanese kha locale switcher.

es.description: Lugha ya Spanish kha locale switcher.
